name: Scrambled Egg & Turkey Bacon Wrap
ingredients: eggs, strips turkey bacon, whole wheat flour tortilla, shredded cheddar cheese, baby spinach, Salt and black pepper to taste
tip: Use corn tortilla + dairy-free cheese to make GF & DF. Omit cheese for DF.

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Granola & Berries
ingredients: plain full-fat Greek yogurt, granola, mixed berries (blueberries, raw honey, chia seeds
tip: Use TNF granola for tree-nut allergy. Use dairy-free coconut yogurt to make DF & VG.

name: Overnight Oats with Almond Butter & Banana
ingredients: rolled oats, whole milk or oat milk, natural almond butter, ripe banana, maple syrup or honey, cinnamon
tip: Contains tree nuts (almond butter). Swap for sunflower seed butter to make TNF & PF. Use oat milk to make DF.

name: Mini Egg Muffins with Spinach & Cheese
ingredients: eggs, baby spinach, shredded mozzarella or cheddar, diced bell pepper, milk, Salt, Cooking spray
tip: Meal-prep friendly --- make Sunday, reheat all week. Omit cheese for DF. Great for nut-allergy households.

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Eggs
ingredients: whole wheat or sourdough bread, ripe avocado, eggs, fresh lemon juice, red chili flakes, Salt
tip: Use GF bread to make Gluten-Free. Omit cheese (if using) for DF. Sesame-free if bagel seasoning is omitted.

name: Cottage Cheese Bowl with Pineapple & Walnuts
ingredients: low-fat cottage cheese, fresh pineapple chunks, chopped walnuts, raw honey, of cinnamon
tip: Contains tree nuts (walnuts). Omit walnuts or swap with pumpkin seeds (pepitas) to make TNF & PF.

name: Smoked Salmon Bagel with Cream Cheese & Cucumber
short_label: Smoked salmon bagel + cream cheese + cucumber
ingredients: whole wheat or gluten-free bagel, cream cheese, smoked salmon, thin cucumber slices, capers, Fresh dill or chives, Lemon wedge for serving
tip: Contains fish and dairy. Use GF bagel for Gluten-Free. Use dairy-free cream cheese spread for DF. Capers are high in sodium --- omit for strict low-sodium.

name: Sweet Potato & Egg Hash
ingredients: sweet potatoes, eggs, red or green bell pepper, yellow onion, olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, Salt and black pepper to taste, Fresh cilantro or parsley to garnish
tip: Free from 8 of the top 9 allergens (contains eggs only). Excellent for most allergy combinations.

name: Whole Wheat Banana Oat Pancakes
ingredients: whole wheat flour, rolled oats, eggs, very ripe banana, whole milk or almond milk, baking powder, vanilla extract, of salt, natural peanut or sunflower seed butter, Sliced banana and drizzle of honey
tip: Contains wheat, eggs, and peanuts. Use certified GF oats + GF flour for Gluten-Free. Swap peanut butter for sunflower seed butter to make PF & TNF.

name: Chicken Congee with Soft-Boiled Egg
ingredients: jasmine or short-grain rice, low-sodium chicken broth, cooked chicken breast, eggs, inch piece fresh ginger, scallions, soy sauce or tamari, sesame oil, White pepper to taste
tip: Use tamari instead of soy sauce for Gluten-Free & Soy-Free alternative. Omit sesame oil for Sesame-Free. Egg is soft-boiled separately --- omit for EF version.

name: Tamagoyaki with Brown Rice & Miso Soup
ingredients: eggs, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, mirin, cooked short-grain brown rice, hot water + 1 tbsp white miso paste, scallion, neutral oil
tip: Use tamari to make GF & SoyF. Skip miso and use low-sodium broth for SoyF soup alternative. The egg roll keeps in the fridge up to 2 days --- slice fresh.

name: Tuna & Brown Rice Onigiri (Rice Balls)
ingredients: cooked short-grain brown rice, water-packed tuna, plain Greek yogurt or light mayo, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, sheets nori, sesame seeds, of sea salt
tip: Use tamari to make GF & SoyF. Omit sesame seeds for SesF. Swap tuna for mashed edamame for a vegan version. Great pre-packed school breakfast.

name: Korean Veggie & Egg Fried Rice (Bokkeumbap)
ingredients: day-old cooked brown rice, eggs, frozen peas and diced carrots, shredded purple cabbage, garlic, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, sesame oil, avocado or vegetable oil, scallions
tip: Use tamari for GF & SoyF. Omit sesame oil for SesF. Day-old rice is key --- it fries without clumping. Great use of leftover dinner rice.

name: Moong Dal Chilla with Mint-Coriander Chutney
ingredients: split yellow moong dal (soaked 4+ hours or overnight, fresh ginger, green chilli, fresh spinach, turmeric, cumin seeds, Salt to taste, oil per chilla for cooking, plain low-fat yogurt + mint chutney to serve
tip: Free from ALL major allergens (Top 9). Excellent for athletes with multiple allergies. Make the batter the night before for a quick morning cook.

name: Besan Omelette (Chickpea Flour Pancake) --- Egg-Free
ingredients: besan, water, onion, tomato, fresh spinach, turmeric, cumin powder, of red chili flakes, Salt to taste, olive or avocado oil, Fresh coriander to garnish
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. The gold standard for egg-free, dairy-free, nut-free youth athletes. Pack leftovers in a wrap for school.

name: Paneer & Spinach Paratha with Plain Yogurt
ingredients: whole wheat flour, Water to knead, crumbled low-fat paneer, baby spinach, cumin powder, garam masala, turmeric, Salt to taste, ghee or olive oil per paratha, plain low-fat yogurt to serve
tip: Contains wheat and dairy. Use GF flour blend for a gluten-free version. Paneer is naturally lactose-lower than milk --- well-tolerated by many with mild dairy sensitivity.

name: Poha with Peanuts, Edamame & Lemon
ingredients: thick flattened rice, roasted peanuts, frozen edamame, onion, potato, turmeric, mustard seeds, curry leaves, avocado or coconut oil, Juice of 1 lemon, Salt to taste
tip: Contains peanuts and soy (edamame). Swap peanuts for pepitas and edamame for sweet corn to make PF & SoyF. Naturally gluten-free (poha is rice-based).

name: Huevos Rancheros with Black Beans
ingredients: eggs, corn tortillas, canned black beans, fresh or jarred low-sodium salsa, crumbled cotija or shredded pepper jack cheese, ripe avocado, plain Greek yogurt or sour cream, Fresh cilantro and lime wedge to serve
tip: Naturally GF with corn tortillas. Contains dairy (cheese) and eggs. Omit cheese for DF. One of the most micronutrient-dense breakfasts in the database.

name: Egg & Black Bean Breakfast Quesadilla
ingredients: whole wheat flour tortillas, eggs, canned black beans, shredded pepper jack or cheddar cheese, diced red bell pepper, low-sodium salsa, olive oil, Salt and pepper to taste
tip: Contains wheat, eggs, and dairy. Use corn tortillas + dairy-free cheese for GF & DF version. Beans add long-lasting energy --- ideal before school or practice.

name: Chilaquiles with Salsa Verde & Fried Egg
ingredients: baked corn tortilla chips, store-bought or homemade salsa verde, eggs, crumbled queso fresco or feta, canned black beans, ripe avocado, plain Greek yogurt, Fresh cilantro, olive oil
tip: GF if chips are 100% corn. Contains eggs and dairy. Omit cheese and use dairy-free yogurt for DF. One of the fastest anti-inflammatory breakfasts in the database.

name: Natto & Brown Rice Power Bowl
ingredients: pack natto (fermented soybeans, cooked short-grain brown rice, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, Japanese mustard, scallion, sheet nori, rice vinegar
tip: Contains soy (natto IS fermented soy). Use tamari to keep GF. Natto is one of Japan's most celebrated athlete foods --- high in K2, protein, and probiotics.

name: Chinese Steamed Egg Custard (Zheng Shui Dan)
ingredients: eggs, low-sodium chicken or vegetable broth (warm, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, sesame oil, scallion, of white pepper
tip: Use tamari for SoyF version; omit sesame oil for SesF. Silky texture makes this one of the easiest high-protein breakfasts. Add with rice to boost carbs to \~350 kcal.

name: Idli with Sambar & Coconut Chutney
ingredients: store-bought or homemade idli, ready-made low-sodium sambar, fresh coconut chutney (blend: ½ cup grated coconut, mustard seeds + curry leaves for chutney tempering, oil for tempering
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Use store-bought ready-to-steam idli batter to save time. Sambar is a complete protein when paired with rice-based idli --- ideal for vegan athletes.

name: Machaca con Huevo (Shredded Beef Scramble)
ingredients: machaca or lean cooked shredded beef, eggs, white onion, tomato, serrano or jalapeño chilli, avocado oil, Salt and black pepper to taste, warm corn tortillas and fresh salsa to serve
tip: One of the highest-protein breakfasts in the database. Machaca is available at Mexican grocery stores. Use shredded slow-cooked beef as a substitute. Naturally GF with corn tortillas.

name: Greek Yogurt Smoothie Bowl with Seeds & Fruit
short_label: Greek yogurt smoothie bowl + seeds + fruit
ingredients: plain full-fat Greek yogurt, frozen banana, frozen mango chunks, Splash of whole milk or oat milk to blend, chia seeds, hemp hearts, fresh berries (blueberries, raw honey, granola
tip: No protein powder needed --- Greek yogurt and hemp hearts supply all the protein. Use dairy-free coconut yogurt + oat milk to make fully vegan. Use TNF granola for nut allergy.

name: Turkey, Avocado & Veggie Whole Wheat Wrap
short_label: Turkey, avocado + veggie whole wheat wrap
ingredients: whole wheat tortilla, sliced oven-roasted turkey breast, ripe avocado, romaine leaf, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, hummus or plain Greek yogurt spread, Dijon mustard, Salt and black pepper to taste
tip: Contains wheat, dairy (if using yogurt spread), and soy (some deli meats). Use corn tortilla for GF. Hummus adds sesame (tahini) --- omit for strict SesF. Great school-packed lunch.

name: Chicken Teriyaki Bowl with Brown Rice & Edamame
short_label: Chicken teriyaki bowl + brown rice + edamame
ingredients: boneless chicken thighs, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, honey, rice vinegar, fresh ginger, arrowroot or cornstarch, cooked brown rice, frozen edamame, shredded purple cabbage, scallions, sesame seeds
tip: Use tamari for GF & SoyF. Omit sesame seeds for SesF. Edamame contains soy --- swap for frozen peas for SoyF. One of the highest-protein lunches in the database.

name: Bibimbap (Korean Mixed Rice Bowl with Beef & Egg)
ingredients: cooked short-grain brown rice, lean ground beef or thinly sliced sirloin, eggs, baby spinach, carrot, bean sprouts, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, sesame oil, honey, garlic, gochujang (Korean chili paste, avocado oil
tip: Use tamari for GF & SoyF. Omit sesame oil for SesF. Gochujang contains some wheat --- use GF gochujang for strict GF. One of the most balanced athlete meals in the database.

name: Dal Tadka with Whole Wheat Roti
ingredients: split red lentils, water, tomato, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, turmeric, cumin seeds, coriander powder, ghee or avocado oil for tadka, Salt to taste, whole wheat rotis, Fresh coriander and lime wedge to serve
tip: Contains wheat (roti). Use certified GF flatbread for GF version. Dal tadka is one of the most iron- and folate-rich lunches for youth athletes. Make a double batch --- keeps 4 days refrigerated.

name: Chicken & Black Bean Tortilla Soup
ingredients: boneless chicken breasts, black beans, fire-roasted diced tomatoes, low-sodium chicken broth, frozen corn kernels, onion, garlic, cumin, smoked paprika, chili powder, avocado oil, Baked corn tortilla strips
tip: Free from 8 of the Top 9 allergens (dairy-free if using yogurt alternative). One of the highest-protein, most allergen-friendly lunches in the database. Freezes well for up to 3 months.

name: Tuna Salad Lettuce Cups
ingredients: water-packed tuna, plain Greek yogurt, celery, diced red onion, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, Salt and black pepper to taste, romaine or butter lettuce leaves, avocado
tip: Contains fish. Swap tuna for canned salmon to vary Omega-3 profile. Use dairy-free yogurt to make DF. One of the quickest, most portable high-protein lunches in the database.

name: Ground Turkey & Veggie Brown Rice Bowl
short_label: Ground turkey + veggie brown rice bowl
ingredients: lean ground turkey, cooked brown rice, broccoli florets, carrot, garlic, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, olive oil, smoked paprika, Salt and pepper to taste, Lime wedge and fresh herbs to serve
tip: Use tamari for GF & SoyF. One of the most macro-balanced lunches --- great for high-output training days. Prep turkey and rice in bulk on Sundays.

name: Egg Salad on Whole Wheat with Greens
short_label: Egg salad on whole wheat + greens
ingredients: eggs, plain Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, celery, Salt, whole wheat bread, baby spinach or arugula, tomato
tip: Contains eggs, wheat, and dairy. Use GF bread for GF version. Dairy-free yogurt swap works well. Egg salad keeps refrigerated up to 2 days --- store separately from bread.

name: Miso Ramen with Soft-Boiled Egg & Chicken
ingredients: portions buckwheat soba noodles, boneless chicken thighs, eggs, low-sodium chicken broth, white miso paste, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, sesame oil, baby bok choy, scallions, bamboo shoots
tip: Use tamari and GF soba (100% buckwheat) for GF & SoyF. Omit sesame oil for SesF. Miso is fermented soy --- use chickpea miso for SoyF. One of the most warming recovery lunches.

name: Korean Japchae (Glass Noodles with Beef & Vegetables)
ingredients: dried sweet potato glass noodles, lean beef sirloin, baby spinach, carrot, red bell pepper, dried shiitake mushrooms, garlic, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, sesame oil, honey, avocado oil, scallion
tip: Glass noodles are made from sweet potato starch --- naturally GF. Use tamari for SoyF. Omit sesame oil for SesF. Great cold the next day --- perfect packed lunch.

name: Chole (Chickpea Curry) with Basmati Rice
ingredients: chickpeas, cooked basmati rice, diced tomatoes, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, cumin, coriander, turmeric, garam masala, cayenne, avocado oil, Salt to taste
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. One of the best plant-based iron and folate sources in the database. Doubles well --- make a big pot and eat 3 days.

name: Saag Paneer with Jeera Rice
ingredients: baby spinach + ½ cup frozen peas, low-fat paneer, onion, garlic, ginger, cumin seeds, turmeric, garam masala, plain low-fat yogurt, avocado oil, Salt to taste, cooked basmati rice (cumin seeds toasted in oil
tip: Contains dairy (paneer and yogurt). Use tofu instead of paneer and coconut yogurt for a vegan, dairy-free version. Spinach and paneer together provide exceptional calcium and iron.

name: Arroz con Pollo (Chicken & Rice)
ingredients: boneless chicken thighs, long-grain or basmati rice, low-sodium chicken broth, diced tomatoes, onion, garlic, frozen peas, cumin, smoked paprika, turmeric, avocado oil, Salt and pepper
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. One-pot meal --- minimal cleanup. Make 3× and freeze individual portions for busy school weeks. Naturally gluten-free.

name: Bean & Cheese Quesadilla with Guacamole
ingredients: whole wheat flour tortillas, canned refried beans or mashed black beans, shredded Monterey Jack or pepper jack cheese, corn kernels, ripe avocado, low-sodium salsa, Fresh cilantro to garnish
tip: Contains wheat and dairy. Use corn tortillas + dairy-free cheese for GF & DF version. Beans and avocado together deliver exceptional folate, potassium, and healthy fats for youth athletes.

name: Soba Noodle Salad with Edamame & Sesame Ginger Dressing
short_label: Soba noodle salad + edamame + sesame ginger dressing
ingredients: dried soba noodles, frozen edamame, carrot, red bell pepper, scallions, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, rice vinegar, fresh ginger, honey, sesame oil, sesame seeds, avocado oil
tip: Use tamari and 100% buckwheat soba for GF & SoyF. Omit sesame seeds and oil for SesF. Edamame is soy-based --- swap for shelled peas for SoyF. Outstanding packed-lunch noodle salad.

name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad (No Croutons)
ingredients: boneless chicken breasts, chopped romaine lettuce, plain Greek yogurt, fresh lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, grated Parmesan, Dijon mustard, Salt and black pepper to taste, Lemon wedges to serve
tip: Contains dairy (Parmesan, yogurt). Omit Parmesan + use dairy-free yogurt for DF. One of the highest pure-protein lunches in the database.

name: Lentil Vegetable Soup with Whole Wheat Roll
short_label: Lentil vegetable soup + whole wheat roll
ingredients: red lentils, carrot, celery, onion, garlic, diced tomatoes, low-sodium vegetable or chicken broth, cumin, turmeric, smoked paprika, olive oil, Juice of ½ lemon, Salt and pepper, whole wheat dinner rolls
tip: Contains wheat (rolls). Use GF rolls or serve with rice crackers for GF version. Free from 8 of the Top 9 allergens. Freezes brilliantly --- make a double batch every Sunday.

name: Salmon Teriyaki with Steamed Broccoli & Rice
ingredients: salmon fillets, low-sodium soy sauce or tamari, honey, rice vinegar, fresh ginger, cornstarch dissolved in 1 tsp water, cooked brown rice, broccoli florets, sesame seeds, Lemon wedge to serve
tip: Contains fish. Use tamari for GF & SoyF. Omit sesame seeds for SesF. One of the richest Omega-3 and Vitamin D lunches in the database.

name: Doenjang Jjigae (Korean Fermented Soybean Stew)
ingredients: doenjang, low-sodium vegetable or anchovy broth, block firm tofu, zucchini, mushrooms, onion, garlic, scallion, green chilli, cooked brown rice per person to serve
tip: Contains soy (doenjang and tofu). Use GF-verified doenjang. Use vegetable broth for FF. One of Korea's most probiotic-rich staple athlete meals.

name: Rajma (Kidney Bean Curry) with Rice
ingredients: red kidney beans, diced tomatoes, onion, garlic, ginger, cumin seeds, coriander powder, turmeric, garam masala, cayenne, avocado or coconut oil, Salt to taste, cooked basmati rice
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Rajma-chawal (kidney beans and rice) is a complete protein combination revered in North Indian cuisine. Excellent for plant-based athletes.

name: Aloo Gobi Wrap with Mint Yogurt
ingredients: potatoes, cauliflower florets, onion, garlic, turmeric, cumin, garam masala, avocado oil, Salt to taste, whole wheat rotis or wraps, plain low-fat yogurt + 2 tbsp chopped fresh mint + pinch of cumin
tip: Contains wheat and dairy. Use GF flatbread and dairy-free yogurt for GF & DF. Aloo gobi (potato & cauliflower) is one of the most popular Indian youth lunch dishes.

name: Fish Tacos with Mango Slaw & Lime Crema
short_label: Fish tacos + mango slaw + lime crema
ingredients: tilapia or mahi-mahi fillets, cumin, Salt and pepper, corn tortillas, shredded purple cabbage, ripe mango, Juice of 1 lime, plain Greek yogurt + 1 tsp lime juice + pinch of salt, Fresh cilantro
tip: Contains fish and dairy. Use dairy-free yogurt for DF. Use 100% corn tortillas for GF. One of the most Vitamin-D-rich and anti-inflammatory lunch options.

name: Pozole Verde with Chicken (Green Hominy Stew)
ingredients: boneless chicken breasts, hominy, low-sodium chicken broth, tomatillos, onion, garlic, jalapeño, cilantro, cumin, Salt to taste, Shredded cabbage
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Hominy is dried maize --- naturally GF and high in fibre. One of the most traditional and nourishing Mexican athlete lunches.

name: Spinach & Feta Stuffed Whole Wheat Pita
short_label: Spinach + feta stuffed whole wheat pita
ingredients: whole wheat pita pocket, baby spinach, crumbled feta cheese, canned chickpeas, cherry tomatoes, hummus, olive oil, Salt and pepper to taste
tip: Contains wheat (pita), dairy (feta), and sesame (hummus/tahini). Use GF flatbread for GF. Omit feta + use dairy-free hummus for DF. Great fast school lunch in under 10 min.

name: Caprese Whole Wheat Sandwich with Pesto
ingredients: whole wheat sourdough or multigrain bread, fresh mozzarella, tomato, fresh basil leaves, basil pesto, balsamic glaze, Salt and black pepper to taste
tip: Contains wheat, dairy, and tree nuts (pesto). Use GF bread for GF. Use nut-free pesto (basil + olive oil + garlic + Parmesan) for TNF. Omit cheese for DF.

name: Sheet Pan Chicken Thighs with Sweet Potato & Broccoli
short_label: Sheet pan chicken thighs + sweet potato + broccoli
ingredients: bone-in chicken thighs (skin removed, sweet potatoes, broccoli florets, olive oil, garlic powder, smoked paprika, onion powder, Salt and black pepper to taste, Fresh parsley and lemon wedges to serve
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. One-pan dinner with minimal cleanup --- ideal for busy school-night cooking. Leftovers keep 4 days; great cold in a lunch wrap.

name: Beef & Vegetable Stir-Fry with Brown Rice
ingredients: flank steak, brown rice, broccoli florets, red bell pepper, snap peas, carrot, garlic, fresh ginger, low-sodium soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, cornstarch, avocado oil, green onions
tip: Contains soy (soy sauce) and sesame. Use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame oil for SesF. Use tamari for GF. High-iron athlete dinner --- great for endurance athletes.

name: Baked Salmon with Quinoa & Roasted Asparagus
ingredients: salmon fillets, quinoa, water, asparagus, olive oil, garlic, lemon, dried dill, smoked paprika, Salt and pepper to taste, fresh parsley
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Salmon is one of the richest food sources of Omega-3 and Vitamin D --- critical for young athletes' bone health, inflammation control, and muscle recovery.

name: Chicken Katsu with Brown Rice & Miso Soup
short_label: Chicken katsu + brown rice + miso soup
ingredients: boneless chicken breasts, panko breadcrumbs, eggs, all-purpose flour, garlic powder, salt, avocado oil, brown rice, water, white miso paste, silken tofu, green onions, sheet dried nori
tip: Contains wheat (panko/flour), eggs, and soy (miso/tofu). Use GF panko + rice flour for GF/WF; use aquafaba for EF. Miso provides beneficial probiotics for gut health.

name: Bulgogi Beef Bowl with Rice & Kimchi
ingredients: beef ribeye or sirloin, short-grain white rice or brown rice, store-bought kimchi, baby spinach or shredded lettuce, carrot, cucumber, toasted sesame seeds, low-sodium soy sauce, brown sugar or honey, sesame oil, garlic, fresh ginger, green onions, Asian pear or apple
tip: Contains soy and sesame. Use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame oil/seeds for SesF. Kimchi provides probiotics and Vitamin C. Great post-game recovery bowl.

name: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) with Basmati Rice
ingredients: boneless chicken thighs, basmati rice, crushed tomatoes, full-fat coconut milk, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, ghee or avocado oil, garam masala, cumin, turmeric, coriander, chili powder, Salt to taste, Fresh cilantro for garnish, plain yogurt, lemon juice
tip: Naturally gluten-free and nut-free. Use coconut yogurt and coconut milk for a fully dairy-free version. Turmeric has anti-inflammatory properties beneficial for athletic recovery.

name: Dal Makhani with Brown Rice
ingredients: whole black lentils, kidney beans, brown rice, diced tomatoes, coconut milk, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, ghee or avocado oil, cumin seeds, garam masala, coriander powder, smoked paprika, Salt to taste, Fresh cilantro and lemon wedges to serve
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Fully vegan. Black lentils are one of the richest plant-based sources of iron and folate --- excellent for young female athletes. Pairs perfectly with brown rice for complete amino acid profile.

name: Carne Asada Tacos with Black Beans & Pico de Gallo
short_label: Carne asada tacos + black beans + pico de gallo
ingredients: skirt steak, corn tortillas, black beans, limes, orange, garlic, cumin, chili powder, olive oil, roma tomatoes, white onion, jalapeño, fresh cilantro, Juice of 1 lime, Salt to taste, avocado, Crumbled cotija cheese
tip: Naturally gluten-free with corn tortillas. Omit cotija cheese for DF. Iron from beef + Vitamin C from pico de gallo is a perfect combination for maximizing iron absorption --- key for growing athletes.

name: Ground Turkey Enchiladas with Red Sauce
ingredients: lean ground turkey, corn tortillas, black beans, frozen corn kernels, red enchilada sauce, shredded Mexican-blend cheese, onion, garlic, cumin, chili powder, oregano, olive oil, Fresh cilantro and lime wedges to serve, avocado
tip: Use corn tortillas for GF. Omit cheese for DF. Contains wheat only if flour tortillas are used --- swap to corn. Low-sodium enchilada sauce keeps this athlete-appropriate. Great meal-prep dinner --- reheats beautifully.

name: Tofu & Vegetable Curry with Brown Rice
ingredients: extra-firm tofu, brown rice, full-fat coconut milk, diced tomatoes, baby spinach, frozen peas, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, avocado oil, curry powder, turmeric, cumin, garam masala, Salt to taste, Fresh cilantro and lemon wedges
tip: Contains soy (tofu). Free from all other Top 9 allergens. Fully vegan and GF. Tofu + spinach + peas deliver a plant-powered protein + iron combo ideal for vegan young athletes. Turmeric and ginger are natural anti-inflammatories.

name: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl with Brown Rice & Edamame
short_label: Teriyaki chicken bowl + brown rice + edamame
ingredients: boneless skinless chicken thighs, brown rice, shelled edamame, shredded purple cabbage, carrot, green onions, sesame seeds, avocado oil, Teriyaki sauce: 4 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce, honey or maple syrup, rice vinegar, fresh ginger, garlic, cornstarch dissolved in 1 tsp water
tip: Contains soy and sesame. Use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame seeds for SesF. Use tamari for GF. Edamame adds plant-based protein and folate --- great for young female athletes.

name: Bibimbap with Seasoned Ground Beef & Mixed Vegetables
short_label: Bibimbap + seasoned ground beef + mixed vegetables
ingredients: lean ground beef, short-grain white rice, baby spinach, bean sprouts, carrot, zucchini, eggs, avocado oil, Gochujang sauce: 2 tbsp gochujang paste, sesame oil, honey, rice vinegar, Beef seasoning: 2 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce
tip: Contains soy, sesame, and eggs. Use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF; omit egg for EF. Classic Korean mixed rice bowl --- every component can be prepped in advance and assembled quickly.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala with Garlic Naan
ingredients: boneless chicken breast, pieces store-bought naan, crushed tomatoes, full-fat coconut milk, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, ghee or avocado oil, garam masala, cumin, turmeric, coriander, chili powder, plain yogurt, Juice of ½ lemon, Fresh cilantro to garnish
tip: Contains wheat (naan) and dairy (yogurt). Use GF flatbread for WF/GF; use coconut yogurt for DF. Turmeric and ginger provide powerful anti-inflammatory benefits for recovery.

name: Sheet Pan Shrimp Fajitas with Guacamole
ingredients: shrimp, flour tortillas, bell peppers (red, onion, avocado oil, chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, smoked paprika, Juice of 1 lime, Salt to taste, Guacamole: 2 avocados mashed with lime juice, Optional: plain Greek yogurt as sour cream substitute
tip: Contains shellfish (shrimp) and wheat (flour tortillas). Use corn tortillas for GF/WF. Omit shrimp and substitute black beans for a ShF vegan version. Shrimp is one of the highest-protein, lowest-calorie seafoods.

name: Turkey Meatballs with Whole Wheat Spaghetti & Marinara
short_label: Turkey meatballs + whole wheat spaghetti + marinara
ingredients: lean ground turkey, whole wheat spaghetti, store-bought low-sodium marinara sauce, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, fresh parsley, Parmesan cheese, Italian seasoning, Salt and pepper to taste, olive oil, Fresh basil to garnish
tip: Contains wheat, egg, and dairy. Use GF pasta + GF breadcrumbs for GF/WF; use flax egg for EF; omit Parmesan for DF. Turkey meatballs are leaner and lower in saturated fat than beef --- better daily option for athletes.

name: Miso-Glazed Salmon with Bok Choy & Jasmine Rice
short_label: Miso-glazed salmon + bok choy + jasmine rice
ingredients: salmon fillets, jasmine rice, baby bok choy, white miso paste, honey or maple syrup, low-sodium soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, fresh ginger, avocado oil, sesame seeds, green onions
tip: Contains soy (miso/soy sauce) and sesame. Use tamari for GF; use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF. Miso provides probiotics; salmon delivers Omega-3 and Vitamin D essential for bone density in teen athletes.

name: Beef & Broccoli Stir-Fry with Garlic Brown Rice
short_label: Beef + broccoli stir-fry + garlic brown rice
ingredients: sirloin or flank steak, broccoli florets, brown rice, garlic, fresh ginger, avocado oil, Sauce: 4 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce, oyster sauce, honey, cornstarch dissolved in 2 tsp water, sesame oil, sesame seeds
tip: Contains soy and sesame. Use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF; use tamari for GF. Oyster sauce adds depth --- omit for shellfish-free. Broccoli + beef = iron and Vitamin C in one pan.

name: Rajma (Red Kidney Bean Curry) with Basmati Rice
ingredients: red kidney beans, basmati rice, crushed tomatoes, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, avocado oil, cumin seeds, turmeric, coriander powder, garam masala, chili powder, water, Salt to taste, Fresh cilantro and lemon wedges to serve
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Fully vegan. Rajma is a Punjabi staple --- high in fiber, folate, and plant-based iron. Lemon juice at serving maximizes iron absorption. Pairs perfectly with rice for complete protein.

name: Slow-Cooker Turkey & Sweet Potato Shepherd's Pie
short_label: Slow-cooker turkey + sweet potato shepherd's pie
ingredients: lean ground turkey, sweet potatoes, frozen corn, frozen peas, carrots, onion, garlic, low-sodium chicken broth, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, rosemary, avocado oil, butter or ghee (optional, Salt and pepper to taste
tip: Naturally gluten-free. Contains dairy (if using butter). Use ghee or omit for DF. Sweet potatoes replace white potato mash --- adding beta-carotene and more potassium, making this a nutrient-dense recovery dinner.

name: Paneer Tikka with Basmati Rice & Cucumber Raita
short_label: Paneer tikka + basmati rice + cucumber raita
ingredients: paneer, basmati rice, red bell pepper, green bell pepper, red onion, avocado oil, Marinade: ½ cup plain yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, garam masala, turmeric, chili powder, Raita: 1 cup plain Greek yogurt, cucumber, cumin
tip: Contains dairy (paneer + yogurt). Naturally gluten-free, soy-free, and nut-free. Paneer is an excellent high-calcium, high-protein vegetarian option --- ideal for lacto-vegetarian athletes who need strong bones.

name: One-Pan Lemon Herb Chicken Thighs with Root Vegetables
short_label: One-pan lemon herb chicken thighs + root vegetables
ingredients: bone-in, sweet potatoes, carrots, green beans, garlic, olive oil, Juice and zest of 1 lemon, dried thyme, dried rosemary, garlic powder, Salt and pepper to taste, Fresh parsley to garnish
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Naturally gluten-free, dairy-free, and paleo-friendly. Bone-in chicken thighs stay juicy and are more forgiving than breasts --- great for new cooks.

name: Agedashi Tofu with Dashi Broth & Steamed Rice
short_label: Agedashi tofu + dashi broth + steamed rice
ingredients: extra-firm tofu, jasmine rice, potato starch or cornstarch, dashi broth, low-sodium soy sauce, mirin, sugar, avocado oil or neutral oil for frying, green onions, fresh ginger, sesame seeds, Optional: bonito flakes
tip: Contains soy and sesame. Use tamari for GF; omit sesame for SesF; use vegetable broth + omit bonito for FF/vegan. Tofu provides calcium and iron --- essential minerals for growing athletes.

name: Black Bean & Sweet Potato Enchilada Casserole
short_label: Black bean + sweet potato enchilada casserole
ingredients: black beans, sweet potatoes, corn tortillas, red enchilada sauce, frozen corn, red bell pepper, onion, garlic, cumin, chili powder, shredded vegan cheese, avocado oil, Fresh cilantro
tip: Contains soy (if using vegan cheese). Use dairy cheese for non-vegan; omit cheese entirely for SoyF/DF. Naturally gluten-free with corn tortillas. Black beans + sweet potato deliver iron, folate, and slow-burning carbs.

name: Honey Garlic Baked Salmon with Quinoa & Broccolini
short_label: Honey garlic baked salmon + quinoa + broccolini
ingredients: salmon fillets, quinoa, broccolini, garlic, honey, low-sodium soy sauce, apple cider vinegar, olive oil, smoked paprika, Lemon wedges and fresh dill to serve
tip: Contains soy (soy sauce). Use coconut aminos for SoyF; use tamari for GF. One-pan cleanup. Honey garlic glaze caramelizes beautifully --- even picky eaters love this one.

name: Chana Masala with Basmati Rice & Chapati
ingredients: chickpeas, basmati rice, store-bought chapati or whole wheat flatbread, diced tomatoes, onion, garlic, fresh ginger, avocado oil, cumin seeds, coriander powder, turmeric, garam masala, chili powder, Juice of ½ lemon, Fresh cilantro and sliced onion to serve
tip: Contains wheat (chapati). Use GF flatbread for GF/WF. Free from 8 of the Top 9 allergens. Chickpeas are powerhouse plant protein --- high in iron, zinc, and folate for growing athletes.

name: Pre-Game Pasta with Light Turkey Marinara
ingredients: white spaghetti or penne, lean ground turkey, low-sodium marinara sauce, garlic, Italian seasoning, olive oil, Salt to taste, Optional: 2 tbsp Parmesan
tip: Contains wheat. Use GF pasta for GF/WF. Omit Parmesan for DF. White pasta = faster-digesting carbs ideal for pre-game. Eat 2--3 hours before competition. Keep fat low; avoid heavy cream sauces.

name: White Rice & Grilled Chicken with Light Teriyaki
short_label: White rice + grilled chicken + light teriyaki
ingredients: boneless skinless chicken breast, white jasmine rice, Light teriyaki: 3 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, cornstarch, avocado oil, Steamed edamame or steamed broccoli, Pickled ginger
tip: Contains soy. Use coconut aminos for SoyF. Use tamari for GF. White rice over brown rice pre-game --- faster digestion, less GI stress. Eat 2--3 hours before competition. Avoid heavy sauces.

name: Banana Oatmeal with Honey & Walnuts
ingredients: old-fashioned rolled oats, water or low-fat milk, ripe bananas --- 1 mashed in, honey or maple syrup, chopped walnuts, cinnamon, of salt
tip: Contains tree nuts (walnuts) and may contain gluten (oats). Use certified GF oats for GF; omit walnuts or use sunflower seeds for TNF; use oat milk for DF. Banana + oats = sustained energy release --- classic pre-game fuel.

name: Peanut Butter & Banana Toast with Honey
ingredients: white bread or whole wheat, natural peanut butter, ripe bananas, honey, Optional: sprinkle of chia seeds for Omega-3
tip: Contains wheat and peanuts. Use GF bread for GF/WF; use sunflower butter for PF. A fast, portable pre-game option. Add honey for quick carbs. Avoid high-fiber bread before competition to minimize GI discomfort.

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Granola & Mixed Berries
short_label: Greek yogurt parfait + granola + mixed berries
ingredients: plain non-fat Greek yogurt, low-fat granola, mixed berries (strawberries, honey, Optional: 1 tbsp chia seeds
tip: Contains dairy and may contain wheat (granola) and tree nuts. Use coconut yogurt for DF; use certified GF granola for GF; check granola for TNF. Greek yogurt delivers 22g protein with fast-absorbing carbs from berries and honey.

name: Brown Rice Cakes with Almond Butter & Sliced Banana
short_label: Brown rice cakes + almond butter + sliced banana
ingredients: plain brown rice cakes, almond butter, ripe bananas, honey, Optional: pinch of cinnamon
tip: Contains tree nuts (almond butter). Use sunflower butter for TNF/PF. Certified GF rice cakes for GF. Super portable pre-game snack --- no refrigeration needed. Ideal for travel days or away games.

name: Chicken & White Rice Congee (Rice Porridge)
ingredients: long-grain white rice, low-sodium chicken broth, boneless chicken breast, fresh ginger, garlic, low-sodium soy sauce, green onions, white pepper, Salt to taste, Optional toppings: a drizzle of sesame oil
tip: Contains soy (soy sauce). Use coconut aminos for SoyF. Naturally GF and DF. Congee is one of the most easily digestible pre-game meals --- the broken-down rice causes minimal GI distress during competition.

name: Whole Wheat Toast with Turkey & Avocado
ingredients: whole wheat bread, deli turkey breast, ripe avocado, lemon juice, Salt and pepper to taste, Optional: 1 slice tomato per toast
tip: Contains wheat. Use GF bread for GF/WF. Check turkey label for GF and SoyF. Avocado provides healthy monounsaturated fats and potassium --- electrolyte-supporting pre-game fuel.

name: Mango Lassi with Oat & Date Energy Balls
ingredients: Mango Lassi: 2 cups plain low-fat yogurt, frozen mango chunks, low-fat milk or oat milk, honey, cardamom, Energy Balls: 1 cup rolled oats, Medjool dates, almond butter, shredded coconut, of salt
tip: Contains dairy (yogurt/milk) and tree nuts (almond butter). Use coconut yogurt + oat milk for DF; use sunflower butter for TNF/PF; use certified GF oats for GF. Mango is rich in Vitamin C; dates provide quick-release glucose.

name: Açaí Bowl with Granola & Sliced Fruit
ingredients: packets unsweetened frozen açaí purée, frozen blueberries, frozen banana, oat milk or almond milk, Toppings: ½ cup low-fat granola, banana, fresh strawberries, honey, Optional: 1 tbsp hemp seeds for extra protein
tip: Use certified GF granola for GF; check granola for TNF. Açaí is rich in antioxidants --- great for reducing pre-game inflammation. Use oat milk for nut-free version. Visually exciting for young athletes.

name: Egg White Veggie Scramble with White Toast
short_label: Egg white veggie scramble + white toast
ingredients: egg whites, white bread, baby spinach, diced red bell pepper, diced onion, olive oil, Salt and pepper to taste, Optional: 1 tbsp salsa on the side
tip: Contains eggs and wheat. Use GF bread for GF/WF. Egg whites are a pure lean protein source with almost no fat --- perfect for athletes who want protein without slowing digestion before competition.

name: Tteokbokki-Style Rice Cakes with Mild Sauce
ingredients: cylindrical Korean rice cakes, low-sodium chicken or vegetable broth, gochujang paste, low-sodium soy sauce, honey, garlic, green onion, Optional: 1 soft-boiled egg
tip: Contains soy (soy sauce). Use coconut aminos for SoyF. Tteok (rice cakes) are naturally gluten-free and one of the fastest-digesting complex carbohydrates available --- ideal pre-game Korean fuel.

name: Chapati with Honey & Banana (Indian Pre-Game Wrap)
ingredients: whole wheat chapati or tortillas, ripe bananas, honey, almond butter, of cardamom
tip: Contains wheat (chapati) and optionally tree nuts (almond butter). Use GF tortilla for GF/WF; omit almond butter for TNF/PF. Honey + banana = quick + medium-release carbs for sustained competition energy.

name: Homemade Sports Drink with Watermelon & Electrolytes
ingredients: fresh watermelon, Juice of 2 limes, cold water, sea salt, honey or maple syrup, Optional: ½ cup coconut water for extra potassium, Ice to serve
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Fully vegan and GF. Natural sports drink --- no artificial colors, dyes, or high-fructose corn syrup. Watermelon contains citrulline, which may reduce muscle soreness.

name: Blueberry & Banana Smoothie with Oats
ingredients: ripe bananas, frozen blueberries, old-fashioned oats, low-fat milk or oat milk, honey, vanilla extract, Optional: 1 scoop of protein-free collagen powder
tip: Contains dairy (if using milk) and oats (may contain gluten). Use oat milk for DF; use certified GF oats for GF. Blueberries are antioxidant-rich --- reduce exercise-induced oxidative stress. Quick to make on game-day mornings.

name: Onigiri (Japanese Rice Balls) with Tuna & Pickled Plum
ingredients: short-grain white rice, tuna in water, umeboshi, sheets nori, sesame seeds, Salt to taste
tip: Contains fish (tuna) and sesame. Omit nori for FF. Use coconut aminos for SoyF. Onigiri are the original pre-game sports food in Japan --- portable, no utensils needed, high carb, easy to digest.

name: Arepa with Black Beans & Scrambled Eggs
ingredients: masarepa, warm water, salt, black beans, eggs, olive oil, Optional: sliced avocado
tip: Contains eggs. Naturally gluten-free --- masarepa is pure corn. Omit eggs for EF (add extra beans). Arepas are one of South America's most beloved pre-game foods --- filling, portable, and made from simple ingredients.

name: Fruit & Nut Butter Energy Smoothie
ingredients: ripe bananas, frozen mango chunks, almond butter or peanut butter, oat milk or low-fat milk, honey, vanilla extract, of cinnamon
tip: Contains tree nuts (almond/peanut butter). Use sunflower butter for TNF/PF. Use oat milk for DF. Fast to make on competition mornings --- all ingredients can be pre-frozen in bags for instant blending.

name: Idli with Coconut Chutney (Steamed Rice Cakes)
ingredients: store-bought or homemade idli, Coconut Chutney: ½ cup shredded coconut, roasted chana dal, green chili, inch fresh ginger, Juice of ½ lemon, Salt to taste, Water to blend, Tempering: 1 tsp avocado oil
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Fully vegan and GF. Idli are South India's go-to pre-game food --- light, filling, and extremely gentle on the digestive system. The fermentation process boosts nutrient absorption.

name: White Flour Tortilla with Honey, Strawberries & Ricotta
short_label: White flour tortilla + honey, strawberries + ricotta
ingredients: white flour tortillas, ricotta cheese, fresh strawberries, honey, Optional: pinch of cinnamon
tip: Contains wheat and dairy. Use GF tortilla for GF/WF; use coconut cream for DF. Quick, no-cook (except warming), and sweet --- great for athletes who don't have appetite pre-game but need carbs.

name: Chocolate Milk & Banana Recovery Shake
ingredients: low-fat chocolate milk, frozen bananas, almond butter, vanilla extract, of sea salt
tip: Contains dairy and tree nuts (almond butter). Use DF chocolate milk substitute for DF. Omit almond butter for TNF/PF. Chocolate milk is one of the most researched post-exercise recovery drinks --- outperforms many commercial sports drinks.

name: Grilled Chicken & Vegetable Recovery Bowl with Quinoa
ingredients: boneless chicken breast, quinoa, roasted broccoli florets, cherry tomatoes, avocado, olive oil, Juice of 1 lemon, garlic powder, turmeric, Salt and pepper to taste, Fresh parsley to garnish
tip: Free from ALL Top 9 allergens. Fully GF and DF. Turmeric's curcumin reduces post-exercise inflammation. Quinoa is a complete protein source with all essential amino acids for muscle repair.

name: Salmon & Sweet Potato Recovery Plate
ingredients: salmon fillets, sweet potatoes, steamed or roasted broccolini, olive oil, garlic powder, smoked paprika, Juice of 1 lemon, fresh dill or parsley, Salt and pepper
tip: Contains fish (salmon). Free from all other Top 9 allergens. Omega-3 from salmon reduces post-game muscle inflammation; sweet potato replenishes glycogen; broccoli provides Vitamin C for immune recovery.

name: Greek Yogurt & Berry Protein Parfait (Post-Game)
ingredients: plain full-fat Greek yogurt, mixed berries (blueberries, granola, honey, chia seeds, Optional: 1 tbsp hemp seeds for extra protein
tip: Contains dairy, tree nuts (granola), and wheat (granola). Use coconut yogurt for DF; use GF certified granola for GF; check granola for TNF. Greek yogurt is one of the highest natural protein-per-calorie foods available.

name: Tuna & Avocado Rice Bowl (Post-Game Recovery)
ingredients: tuna in water, cooked white or brown rice, ripe avocado, cucumber, shredded purple cabbage, low-sodium soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, honey, sesame seeds, green onions
tip: Contains fish, soy, and sesame. Use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF; use tamari for GF. Tuna + avocado = protein + anti-inflammatory fats. Rice replenishes glycogen. Quick no-cook post-game option.

name: Korean Doenjang Jjigae (Soybean Paste Stew) Recovery Bowl
ingredients: doenjang, low-sodium vegetable or anchovy broth, block firm tofu, zucchini, mushrooms, garlic, green chili (optional, green onions, cooked white rice
tip: Contains soy (doenjang and tofu). Korean fermented foods provide probiotics; tofu delivers complete plant protein for muscle recovery; mushrooms add zinc and B vitamins.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala Recovery Rice Bowl (Indian)
ingredients: boneless chicken thighs, plain Greek yogurt, tikka masala spice blend, crushed tomatoes, full-fat coconut milk or heavy cream, onion, garlic, inch fresh ginger, olive oil, cooked basmati rice, Fresh cilantro for garnish
tip: Contains dairy (yogurt/cream) --- use coconut milk for DF. Chicken thighs have more iron and zinc than breast meat; basmati rice is lower glycemic index than regular white rice; turmeric in tikka blend is anti-inflammatory.

name: Egg Fried Rice with Edamame & Vegetables (Chinese)
ingredients: cooked cold rice, eggs, frozen edamame, frozen peas and carrots mix, green onions, garlic, low-sodium soy sauce, sesame oil, neutral oil, white pepper
tip: Contains eggs, soy, sesame. Use tamari for GF; coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame oil for SesF. Edamame is a complete plant protein; cold rice has resistant starch that slows digestion beneficially for recovery.

name: Black Bean & Sweet Potato Burrito Bowl (Mexican)
short_label: Black bean + sweet potato burrito bowl
ingredients: black beans, sweet potatoes, cooked brown rice, corn kernels, salsa, avocado, lime, cumin, olive oil, Fresh cilantro
tip: Completely free from all Top 9 allergens (dairy-free if no sour cream). Best plant-based post-game recovery bowl; black beans + rice = complementary proteins; sweet potato = anti-inflammatory beta-carotene + potassium for cramp prevention.

name: Teriyaki Beef & Broccoli Recovery Bowl (Japanese)
ingredients: flank steak or sirloin, broccoli florets, cooked white rice, low-sodium soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, sesame oil, garlic, fresh ginger, sesame seeds, neutral oil
tip: Contains soy and sesame. Use tamari for GF; coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF. Beef is one of the richest bioavailable iron and zinc sources; broccoli adds Vitamin C which enhances iron absorption by up to 3x.

name: Lentil & Vegetable Recovery Soup (Indian Masoor Dal)
ingredients: red lentils, diced tomatoes, onion, garlic, inch ginger, turmeric, garam masala, low-sodium vegetable broth, spinach, olive oil, Lemon juice and cilantro to serve, Whole wheat naan or brown rice
tip: Free from all Top 9 allergens. Red lentils are one of the fastest-cooking legumes and among the richest plant-based iron sources; turmeric's curcumin reduces exercise-induced muscle damage and soreness.

name: Turkey & Avocado Whole Grain Wrap (American)
ingredients: sliced turkey breast, whole-wheat tortillas, ripe avocado, baby spinach, shredded carrots, sliced cucumber, hummus, Salt and pepper to taste, Optional: 1 tbsp pumpkin seeds for extra zinc
tip: Contains gluten (tortilla), dairy (potential in hummus). Use GF tortillas for GF; check hummus for sesame (tahini). Turkey breast is one of the highest protein-to-calorie ratio meats; avocado provides healthy monounsaturated fats for joint recovery.

name: Miso Salmon Onigiri Bowl (Japanese Post-Game)
ingredients: salmon fillets, white miso paste, mirin, low-sodium soy sauce, cooked Japanese short-grain rice, edamame (shelled, shredded purple cabbage, sesame seeds, sheets nori, rice vinegar
tip: Contains fish, soy (miso), sesame. Use tamari for GF; omit sesame for SesF; use coconut aminos for SoyF. Miso is fermented --- supports gut microbiome recovery; salmon's EPA/DHA fats reduce muscle inflammation within 24 hours.

name: Chicken & Quinoa Power Salad with Lemon Tahini (American)
ingredients: grilled chicken breast, cooked quinoa, mixed greens (spinach, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, kalamata olives, tahini, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, Salt and pepper
tip: Contains sesame (tahini) --- omit tahini for SesF and use lemon-olive oil dressing instead. Quinoa has 8g protein per cup and all essential amino acids; kale + spinach provide high Vitamin C for collagen synthesis and iron absorption.

name: Cottage Cheese & Pineapple Recovery Bowl (American)
ingredients: full-fat cottage cheese, fresh pineapple chunks (or canned in juice, sliced strawberries, granola, honey, vanilla extract, Optional: 2 tbsp sliced almonds for healthy fat
tip: Contains dairy, gluten (granola), tree nuts (almonds --- optional). Use GF granola for GF; omit almonds for TNF. Cottage cheese is among the richest sources of casein protein --- ideal for overnight muscle repair when consumed post-evening game.

name: Edamame & Brown Rice Recovery Bowl with Ginger Miso Dressing
short_label: Edamame + brown rice bowl + ginger miso dressing
ingredients: cooked brown rice, shelled edamame, shredded red cabbage, carrot, cucumber, white miso paste, rice vinegar, low-sodium soy sauce, fresh ginger, sesame oil, sesame seeds, green onions
tip: Contains soy (edamame, miso, soy sauce) and sesame. Use tamari for GF; coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF. Edamame is one of the few plant foods with all 9 essential amino acids; miso adds gut-supporting probiotics.

name: Paneer & Chana Dal Recovery Thali (Indian)
ingredients: chana dal, paneer, diced tomatoes, onion, garlic, turmeric, ghee or neutral oil, water or low-sodium vegetable broth, Fresh cilantro and lemon juice to serve, cooked basmati rice or whole-wheat roti
tip: Contains dairy (paneer, ghee). Use firm tofu for DF/vegan. Paneer is rich in casein protein for overnight muscle repair; chana dal has lower glycemic index than white rice --- ideal for athletes managing blood sugar.

name: Birria-Style Beef & Bean Recovery Tacos (Mexican)
ingredients: beef chuck, pinto beans, dried guajillo chiles, diced tomatoes, garlic, cumin, low-sodium beef broth, corn tortillas, diced white onion, Fresh cilantro
tip: Completely free from all Top 9 allergens (corn tortillas are GF; verify no cross-contamination). Beef chuck is one of the most bioavailable iron and zinc sources; beans double the fiber for sustained energy recovery.

name: Sweet Potato & Egg Recovery Hash (American)
ingredients: sweet potatoes, eggs, red bell pepper, onion, baby spinach, olive oil, smoked paprika, Optional: hot sauce or salsa on the side
tip: Contains eggs. Free from all other Top 9 allergens. Eggs are among the most nutrient-dense foods available --- providing complete protein, Vitamin D, choline, and B12; sweet potato is the richest whole-food source of Vitamin A for immune recovery.

name: Kimchi Fried Rice with Eggs & Beef (Korean)
ingredients: cooked day-old rice, kimchi, lean ground beef, eggs, low-sodium soy sauce, sesame oil, green onions, neutral oil, gochugaru (Korean red pepper --- optional
tip: Contains eggs, soy (soy sauce), sesame. Use tamari for GF; coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF. Kimchi's fermented lactobacillus bacteria support gut microbiome recovery; beef provides fast-absorbing heme iron and zinc.

name: Apple Slices with Almond Butter & Granola (American)
ingredients: apples, natural almond butter, granola, honey, of cinnamon
tip: Contains tree nuts (almonds) and gluten (granola). Use GF granola for GF; use sunflower seed butter for TNF. Almond butter is one of the highest calcium nut butters --- 2 tbsp provides 10% daily calcium. Apple pectin fiber feeds gut bacteria.

name: Custom Athlete Trail Mix (American)
ingredients: roasted pumpkin seeds, roasted almonds or cashews, dried cranberries or raisins, dark chocolate chips, sunflower seeds, Optional: ¼ cup coconut flakes
tip: Contains tree nuts (almonds/cashews). Use all seeds (pumpkin + sunflower + hemp) for TNF. Dark chocolate adds flavonoids that reduce exercise-induced inflammation; pumpkin seeds are one of the most zinc-dense snack foods available.

name: Hummus & Veggie Sticks with Whole Wheat Pita (American/Mediterranean)
short_label: Hummus + veggie sticks + whole wheat pita
ingredients: store-bought or homemade hummus, cucumber, carrots, red bell pepper, whole wheat pita breads, Optional: ½ tsp za'atar or smoked paprika on hummus
tip: Contains sesame (tahini in hummus) and gluten (pita). Use rice crackers or GF pita for GF; use tahini-free hummus (white bean dip) for SesF. Bell pepper's Vitamin C triples the iron absorption from chickpea hummus.

name: Mini Cheese & Bean Quesadilla Triangles (Mexican)
ingredients: whole wheat or corn tortillas, canned black beans, shredded Monterey Jack or cheddar cheese, salsa, Optional: 1 tbsp Greek yogurt as sour cream substitute, Optional: sliced avocado
tip: Contains dairy (cheese) and gluten (flour tortilla). Use corn tortillas for GF; use dairy-free cheese for DF. Cheese provides calcium + casein protein; black beans add iron and fiber. One of the most popular after-school snacks for teen athletes.

name: Smoked Salmon & Cream Cheese Cucumber Rounds (American)
short_label: Smoked salmon + cream cheese cucumber rounds
ingredients: English cucumber, smoked salmon, cream cheese, capers, Fresh dill or chives for garnish, Lemon zest and black pepper
tip: Contains fish (salmon) and dairy (cream cheese). Use dairy-free cream cheese for DF. Smoked salmon is one of the richest natural sources of Vitamin D and Omega-3 EPA/DHA; cucumber provides hydration and potassium with almost no calories.

name: Hard-Boiled Eggs & Cheese Snack Box (American)
ingredients: eggs, sharp cheddar or string cheese, grape tomatoes, baby carrots, Everything Bagel Seasoning, Salt and pepper to taste
tip: Contains eggs, dairy (cheese), sesame (Everything Bagel Seasoning). Omit seasoning for SesF; use DF cheese for DF. Eggs are the gold standard reference protein for bioavailability --- rated 100 on the Biological Value scale, higher than meat, fish, or any plant protein.

name: Mango Lassi with Chia Seeds (Indian)
ingredients: plain whole-milk yogurt, frozen or fresh mango chunks, milk, chia seeds, honey, ground cardamom, of salt
tip: Contains dairy (yogurt, milk). Use coconut yogurt + oat milk for DF. Cardamom is an Ayurvedic digestive aid; mango provides beta-carotene converted to Vitamin A which supports tissue repair; chia seeds add plant-based Omega-3 ALA.

name: Seaweed & Edamame Rice Crackers Snack Box (Japanese)
ingredients: shelled edamame, roasted seaweed snack sheets, brown rice crackers, tamari dipping sauce, sesame seeds
tip: Contains soy (edamame, tamari) and sesame (optional). Use coconut aminos for SoyF; omit sesame for SesF. Nori (seaweed) is the richest plant source of B12 --- making it particularly valuable for vegetarian and vegan athletes.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Energy Bites (American)
ingredients: rolled oats, natural peanut butter, honey, ripe banana, dark chocolate chips, ground flaxseed, vanilla extract, of salt
tip: Contains peanuts and gluten (oats --- use GF oats for GF). Use sunflower seed butter for PF; use allergen-free chocolate chips for TNF. Flaxseed adds ALA Omega-3; banana provides potassium for muscle cramping prevention.

name: Guacamole & Baked Tortilla Chips (Mexican)
ingredients: ripe avocados, lime, red onion, jalapeño, fresh cilantro, Salt and pepper to taste, baked corn tortilla chips
tip: Completely free from all Top 9 allergens. Avocado provides 975 mg potassium per fruit --- more than a banana; folate in avocado supports cell repair; lime's Vitamin C enhances iron absorption from any meal eaten alongside.

name: Greek Yogurt Bark with Berries & Granola (American)
ingredients: plain Greek yogurt, honey, mixed berries (blueberries, granola, chia seeds, Optional: 1 tbsp dark chocolate chips
tip: Contains dairy (yogurt), gluten (granola), tree nuts (granola may contain). Use GF granola for GF; DF yogurt alternative for DF. Greek yogurt bark is particularly popular for hot-season tournament play --- the frozen format acts as hydration support.

name: Savory Roasted Chickpeas (Indian-Spiced)
ingredients: chickpeas, olive oil, cumin, garlic powder, Optional: ¼ tsp cayenne for heat
tip: Completely free from all Top 9 allergens. Chickpeas are one of the most iron-dense plant snacks; turmeric is anti-inflammatory; curcumin absorption is enhanced 20x when eaten with black pepper --- add a pinch if tolerated.

name: Tuna Salad Lettuce Cups (American)
ingredients: tuna in water, plain Greek yogurt or light mayo, celery stalk, red onion, lemon juice, Salt, romaine or butter lettuce leaves, Optional: sliced cucumber inside cups
tip: Contains fish (tuna) and dairy (if using yogurt). Use mayo for DF. One of the highest protein-per-calorie snacks in this database --- 32g protein for only 200 kcal. Tuna is the most bioavailable source of Vitamin D after salmon.

name: Banana Oat Pancake Bites (American)
ingredients: ripe bananas, eggs, rolled oats, natural peanut butter, cinnamon, vanilla extract, blueberries or mini dark chocolate chips, of salt
tip: Contains eggs, peanuts (peanut butter), and gluten (oats --- use GF oats for GF). Use sunflower seed butter for PF. Banana + oats = slow-release carbohydrates ideal between morning and afternoon training sessions; eggs bind without flour.

name: Spiced Warm Milk with Turmeric & Dates (Indian Golden Milk)
ingredients: whole milk, ground turmeric, ground cinnamon, ground ginger, of black pepper, honey, Medjool dates
tip: Contains dairy (milk). Use oat or almond milk for DF. Golden milk is one of the most researched anti-inflammatory beverages --- curcumin + piperine combination is more potent than most OTC anti-inflammatory supplements. Dates provide natural iron and potassium.
